title: Did Candace Owens discontinue the Erika Kirk series ‘Bride of Charlie’ as viewership reportedly dropped?
summary_full: Candace Owens sparked online debate after appearing to shift focus away from her controversial series about Erika Kirk. A viral social media post claimed the series was sidelined as audience interest declined. Owens instead promoted a new episode discussing geopolitical issues, leaving followers questioning whether the Erika Kirk storyline has ended or simply paused.
